metadata.description: Claude Code tooling for benchmarking, generating, and restructuring a repo's AI context configuration.

plugins.name: config-bench
plugins.description: A/B-benchmark two Claude context configs (Before/After) and read back what got faster, cheaper, or regressed. Bundles the claude-benchmark CLI (auto-downloaded on first use).

plugins.name: quizgen
plugins.description: Draft a benchmark corpus — probes plus how they're graded — from a project's docs and code, in three parallel streams. You draft; the dev finalizes.

plugins.name: config-refactor
plugins.description: Reorganize a repo's CLAUDE.md + .claude/rules to shrink always-on context without losing any instruction. Produces a migration plan, never a silent rewrite.
